Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.2ad54bf7-a85f-014c-e326-1ca4fa37f762.Caption
Item.Value: Show end date/time if collect from now till specified date/time. Make the end date/time required

Item.Name: AddonConfig.Rules.9f370456-07f2-916d-2b9c-395c07b48d22.Caption
Item.Value: Show start and end date/time if collect between two date/times. Make start/end date/times required.

Item.Name: Caption
Item.Value: Statistics collect parameters modal page (Business rules)
